violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of the lowboy refrigeration units, and the bottom of the cold rail have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The hand sink in the front prep area was observed to be leaking. A plumbing system shall be remained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The following was observed at the time of inspection: 1) The ceiling vents in the front prep and back kitchen area has an accumulation of dust. 2) The floors under the front cold-holding equipment was observed with an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by the trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the under the cold rail have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The waterspout was observed to be in contact with water in the dipper well. This serves as an air-break, the spout was adjusted to have an air-gap at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed with a leak that is draining into a container. A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
